description_long: This is a rectangular box of Haldiram's Soan Papdi, a popular Indian sweet snack. The packaging is predominantly red with ornate gold patterns along one edge and features images of the Soan Papdi pieces garnished with pistachios and almonds. The front and top surfaces prominently display the product name 'SOAN PAPDI' in bold white letters, along with the phrase 'Made with Desi Ghee' in green. The box appears to be made of cardboard and is sealed, with all sides covered in printed branding and product imagery. The overall appearance is festive and eye-catching, designed to attract attention in a retail or urban setting. The box is compact and lightweight, suitable for carrying by hand or placing on a shelf.
description: A red rectangular box of Haldiram's Soan Papdi with gold accents and images of the sweet on the packaging. The box is visually striking, featuring bold branding and appetizing product photos.
description_view_0: The front of the box shows the 'SOAN PAPDI' label, Haldiram's logo, and a product image, with ornate gold detailing along the left edge.
description_view_1: The side view displays the 'SOAN PAPDI' label and images of the sweet, with less ornate decoration and more product information.
description_view_2: This angled view highlights the top and front of the box, showing both the main branding and the decorative gold border.
description_view_3: The back or opposite side of the box, featuring the product name, images of Soan Papdi, and additional branding, with less ornate detail.
attribute_brand_logo: The Haldiram's brand logo is visible on the front and top of the box, featuring a white script on a red oval background.
attribute_flavor_indication: The box displays 'Made with Desi Ghee' in green text, indicating the flavor is traditional Soan Papdi made with clarified butter.
